title: Frost
description: Ever wanted to live in a Frozen wasteland? This modpack turns Minecraft into just that
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b22835b9a4a14d1cb72b22fbfb7e648e03bd59af.png)

## Frost is a Modpack intended to make Minecraft an unforgiving, deadly, frozen wasteland.

In this modpack, every second counts, as from the moment you create a world, you are tasked with warming yourself to avoid freezing to death using torches, campfires, clothes etc. 

In addition to the hunger bar, you also have a thirst meter, so make sure dehydration doesn't get you as well.

Also good luck finding food, as most passive mobs don't spawn in the overworld, so you'll have to make due with farming and fishing.

In a nutshell, this modpack is designed to eliminate you. The question is, will you let it?

**This is the official modpack for niko's _"Minecraft Frost"_  series.**

## Modpack Contents
